    Nevermore-town

    Description

    The new city of Nevermore

    Version

    1.1.1

    Vovan1698

    Contact

    discord: Vovan1698

    Heroes

    Name Biography Gender Image Specialty
    Absorber The Absorber was one of the first inhabitants of the Dimensions-between-Dimensions to set foot on the land of Enroth. He was also one of the first to taste the pain and despair of the inhabitants of this land. Eventually, he became so sated that he had to periodically return to his home world and give his surplus energy to his fellows. male -1 Morale
    Azakor The Dark Dimension is teeming with unknown and dangerous creatures, but few of them are likely to compare to the Flesh Lord Azakor. No one in Antagarich knows of his nature, and no one knows what exactly to expect when meeting him. male Cadaver
    Cornelius In narrow circles, Cornelius is known as the Blind Mad Prophet, who prophesies of a coming era of chaos and madness. On this topic, he wrote a book called 101 Ways to Make Apple Jam. The content of the book is similar to a bunch of recipes, seasoned with all sorts of nonsense and delirium... that's what most people who have read it think. But there are those who don't think so, because the book reveals its true meaning to the chosen ones, and after reading it, the consciousness of these people changes forever. male Clone
    Destroyer With the beginning of the rifts and the merging of the dark dimension with the mortal world, not only soulless nightmares feeding on emotions poured into the realm of life, but also real destroyers of all life in their path. This phantasm will make Antagarich burn more than once. male Fire Phantom
    Fortune This horror existed on Enroth even before the first rifts appeared. Fortune likes to play with her victims - She takes away the last hopes of some, others are incredibly lucky, but only so that in the end they too lose everything, including their sanity. male Fortune
    Jack Jack is unpredictability itself. One minute he is cheerful and good-natured. The next he is wrapping your intestines around your neck or sawing off your head with a blunt knife... although, most of all he loves to tickle to death. Jack is an inspiration for many harlequins, because he is the only one who was able to dance for 25 hours on the grave of King Gryphonheart... and would have continued dancing, if the guard had not woken up... male Sorrow
    Jenny As a child, Jenny had a home and a large family. Even then, they noticed that the girl suffered from sleepwalking, but they could not imagine that one day she would cut out her entire family in her sleep. So she found herself alone with her teddy bear... When the first Limits appeared, Jenny began to see terrible images of that night that she had been trying to forget all these years. This led to the fact that one day in her sleep she released such a powerful flow of magical energy that she burned down the entire monastery along with its inhabitants. That same night, she left. Jenny walked without making out the road, her head was in confusion. Coincidence or not, but she came to one of the Limits. female Hypnotize
    K'Tahun Protei are among the most dangerous inhabitants of the dark dimension. Their power is truly incredible, they have reached the highest point of evolution of their world, forcing every horror to bow before them. But few of these creatures can boast of the power of K'tahun. male Proteas
    Morglin Do you hear the clatter and clanking of buckets and kitchen utensils? That means the famous King of Enroth, Morglin Ironfist, is coming for your soul! But since he died long ago, he is most likely one of those people with great imagination who have a short circuit in their heads... In any case, this Morglin turned out to be a much better commander than the previous seven. male Resistance
    Nehmar It so happened that one of the most powerful entities penetrated through the rift into the mortal world and, having saturated himself with the local magic, was able to discover the power to materialize his phantom body. Now he bears the name Nehmar male Chain Lightning
    Poison Poison has never been a good commander. However, his advantage over the enemy is the ability to be in several places at once. Brute force is useless against him - after a blow, he only falls apart in two, and each of them acts separately. male Horrors
    Spark Not everyone had a happy ending to the madness in the elementary dimensions. Spark got stuck in the Dimension-between-Dimensions and spent a long time looking for a way out. The alien world played with her, putting up illusory gates that disappeared before her nose. When despair finally broke Spark, the fire in her soul went out. All that remained was an endless void that had worked her. female Sorcery
    Theodore Theodore was born on Regna and was a pretty ordinary pirate until he fell off the mast, hitting his head hard. After that, he began to hear voices that he could only drown out with booze and drugs... When the Limits arose, the voices turned into screams, escaping from which he smoked so much that he lost all connection with reality... Having come to his senses a little, Theodore found himself one of the commanders of the Limit armies. A lot of time has passed, but he still cannot understand whether this is a hallucination or reality. male Jesters
    Vanessa Vanessa was a wandering minstrel. She set out on her travels because she felt that only such a way of life would give her freedom, since a settled life in the cities was boring and monotonous for her. One day, when she was walking through the forest, she was hit on the back of the head with a stone and robbed. Foresters found her and carried her to the nearest village. Vanessa was unconscious for several weeks, and when she came to, her views on freedom had changed somewhat. female Empaths
    Whisper The whisper glides through the shadows. It always appears unexpectedly, and its thousand-voiced call sounds right in the head, driving its enemies crazy. male Offence
    Zantora Not long ago, Zantora terrified even her fellow necromancers from Shadow Peak with her research in the field of necromancy. Her obsession was turning bone dragons into absolute death machines. After the emergence of the Limits, her madness became so boundless that Sandro decided it was time to get rid of Zantora as far as possible. However, she left on her own and now serves the lords of madness and loves to travel the Dimension-between-dimensions, because the most terrible nightmares of people inspire her to new achievements. female Mysticism
